description: rank_search_matches re-ranks the staged 1850-census Flynn search (one candidate) against tree subject I1 (Patrick Flynn, b.~1845 Ireland). Name, birth year, and place all align, so the record scores high (0.85) and lands at matchRank 1 — but the underlying record (recordTitle 'Patrick Flynn — Head of Household, 1850', role Head) lists a 5-year-old as head of household in 1850, an impossible role the skill's Step-4 logical cross-check must catch. The high match score must NOT be the arbiter: a strong score plus an impossible household role is a needs-review conflict, not a confirmed match. Not attached to any tree person, so the triage decision hinges entirely on the logical cross-check. Matched on subjectId; independent of the per-run stagedResultsRef handle.
